images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunning Japanese idol‑style model, early twenties, flawless realistic skin with visible pores and faint vellus hair, large expressive eyes, a cute yet seducing face, a fit curvy silhouette—slim waist, ample bust—her straight black silky hair plastered wet and glossy from a recent shower, clinging to her neck. She wears a Korean prep‑school look: an oversized ivory button‑down shirt, left unbuttoned to show a delicate black lace bralette, a high‑waist pleated navy skirt, knee‑high white socks and polished black loafers. The abandoned factory interior glows with warm golden sunlight and a subtle monitor‑screen blue fill, creating bright, clear light while a shallow depth of field blurs the broken windows. She stares directly into the lens with intense, lazy‑sluggish eyes. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray‑traced lighting, global illumination, crisp bokeh.8k photo, Large breasts
